comment.text: This text appears on a button within a modal dialog. It prompts the user to navigate to a tariff plan page, likely to upgrade or view details related to storage limits or a grace period. Translators should ensure the wording implies a link to a pricing or plan selection area.

usage.context:
</Text>
 </ModalDialog.Body>
 <ModalDialog.Footer>
 <Button
 key="OkButton"
 label={t("GoToTariffPlan")}
 size={ButtonSize.normal}
 primary
 onClick={onClick}
 testId="grace_period_ok_button"
 />
